content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

A geek gave 40% of his retirement money to his wife. He also gave 20 % of the remaining amount to each of his 3 sons. 50 % of the amount now left was spent on miscellaneous items and the remaining amount of Rs. 1,20,000 was deposited in the bank. How much money did the geek get as retirement money? 

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

 Let the retirement money be Rs. 100 n 
Money given to wife = 40 % of 100 n = 40 n, 
Balance = 60 n 
Money given to 3 sons = 3 x (20 % of 60 n) = 3 x 12 n = 36 n, 
Balance = 24 n 
Money spent on miscellaneous items = 50 % of 24 n = 12 n,
Balance = 12 n 
Now, this remaining 12 n is the money deposited in the bank, 
i.e., Rs. 1,20,000 => 12 n = 1,20,000 => n = 10,000 
Therefore, geek's retirement money = 100 n = Rs. 10,00,000
